description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a formal pinstripe business suit with a collared shirt and an open neckline, exuding a classic, confident urban style. The figure has a defined facial structure with short, neatly styled hair and is depicted holding a briefcase in one hand. A cigar is visible in the mouth, adding to the character's distinctive, assertive demeanor. The suit is complemented by dress shoes, and the overall posture is upright and assertive, suggesting a purposeful presence. The hands are relaxed at the sides, and the figure's build is average, with realistic human proportions. The asset is detailed with visible suit lapels, shirt cuffs, and subtle texturing on the clothing.
description: A male adult in a formal pinstripe suit with a collared shirt, holding a briefcase and a cigar, standing upright with a confident posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full suit, open shirt collar, facial features, briefcase in left hand, and cigar in mouth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the cigar, and the briefcase hanging at the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the suit, hairstyle, and the briefcase's position against the leg.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, the relaxed right hand, and the suit's fit along the body.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and open neckline
